name: generalupdate-skill
description: Complete .NET auto-update skill suite for GeneralUpdate — desktop and mobile. 8 skills covering: Bootstrap scaffolding, update UI (6 frameworks), 6 strategies (Client-Server/OSS/Silent/Differential/CVP/Push), advanced extension points (Bowl, IPC, AOT), mobile auto-update (Avalonia.Android & MAUI.Android), 50+ known issues diagnosis with BM25 search engine, version migration, and security audit. All templates target NuGet v10.5.0-rc.1.
